title: The Crew Reaches the Floating Restaurant Baratie
description: On pages 12–15, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you very knowled- gentle?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: about wine, I mean.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah, yes... but I think my tongue's a little off today for some reason...

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: The hell's going on!? I specifically asked the owner to bring out that wine for me!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Owner, are you alright!?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: You think I'm alright? anyways, enough yapping and get back to work!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: B-But Sir!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: YOUR BODY'S...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you trying to make me angry!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's a cook's duty to keep his customers well-fed.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you planning on ruining my restaurant, you numbskulls!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sir! We brought the one responsible for this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the perp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry, Mister!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: restaurant of the seas' owner and head chef, ZEF

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: gyaaaaa!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You lost your foot because of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, so you lost that foot a long time ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm still injured all over my body thanks to you!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If you got no money, then you'll have to work it off...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sure thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll make it up to you.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You'll work odd jobs around my restaurant without pay for a full year!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Only then, I'll forgive you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: O-One year!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffyy's sure taking awhile...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You don't think they'll force him to work here for like a month or something, do you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He should just explain that it was all the Marine's fault. That idiot's too honest for his own good...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, let's go in and see him! We could get some food while we're at it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Whaddya say!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ooh Waiter!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I already told you I'm not a waiter.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: my, my. What a beautiful lady we have here.

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
